member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Auth.AuthSchemes
member.summary: Authentication scheme names registered by AddCustomerAuth and AddAdminAuth.

member.name: F:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Auth.AuthSchemes.Customer
member.summary: Customer (Entra External ID) bearer scheme.

member.name: F:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Auth.AuthSchemes.Admin
member.summary: Admin (Entra ID) bearer scheme.

member.name: F:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Auth.AuthSchemes.CombinedChallenge
member.summary: Combined challenge scheme — accepts either above.

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Auth.AuthPolicies
member.summary: Authorization policy names.

member.name: F:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Auth.AuthPolicies.RequireCustomer
member.summary: Requires a customer principal (Entra External ID).

member.name: F:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Auth.AuthPolicies.RequireAdmin
member.summary: Requires an admin principal (Entra ID).

member.name: F:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Auth.AuthPolicies.OwnsResource
member.summary: Requires that the caller's oid/sub claim matches the {customerId} route value.

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Auth.EntraAuthOptions
member.summary: Configuration section for an Entra OIDC issuer.

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Auth.EntraAuthOptions.Authority
member.summary: OIDC authority URL (no trailing slash). E.g., https://login.ciamlogin.com/{tenantId}/v2.0.

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Auth.EntraAuthOptions.Audience
member.summary: Expected token audience (e.g., api://acme-retail-api).

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Auth.EntraAuthOptions.RequiredRoles
member.summary: For admin auth: required role/app-role names.

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Auth.EntraAuthExtensions
member.summary: DI extension methods that wire up Entra External ID (customers) and Entra ID (admins) JWT bearer authentication. Per .eas/policies/zero-trust.md §1: NO client secrets, authority + audience only.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Auth.EntraAuthExtensions.AddCustomerAuth(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Registers the customer (Entra External ID) bearer scheme + RequireCustomer policy.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Auth.EntraAuthExtensions.AddAdminAuth(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Registers the admin (Entra ID) bearer scheme + RequireAdmin policy.

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Auth.OwnsResourceRequirement
member.summary: Authorization requirement: caller's id claim matches a route-bound {customerId}.

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Auth.OwnsResourceHandler
member.summary: Handler for . Compares the caller's oid (preferred) or sub claim against the customerId route value. Per .eas/policies/zero-trust.md §2, customers may access only their own data.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Auth.OwnsResourceHandler.#ctor(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IHttpContextAccessor)
member.summary: Creates a handler.

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.CosmosClientFactory
member.summary: Builds a single shared backed by . Per .eas/policies/zero-trust.md §1: managed identities only, NO connection strings.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.CosmosClientFactory.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.CosmosOptions})
member.summary: Creates a factory from the bound options.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.CosmosClientFactory.Create
member.summary: Builds a configured using DefaultAzureCredential.

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.CosmosDocuments
member.summary: Persistence document shapes — the on-disk projection of domain entities. Kept separate from the domain so domain types remain serialisation-agnostic. System.Text.Json (per .eas/instruction.md forbidden list — no Newtonsoft.Json).

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.CosmosOptions
member.summary: Configuration for the Cosmos DB connection. Bound from the Cosmos section.

member.name: F:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.CosmosOptions.SectionName
member.summary: Configuration section name.

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.CosmosOptions.Endpoint
member.summary: Cosmos account endpoint (e.g., https://acme-retail-prod.documents.azure.com:443/).
member.remarks: Authentication uses DefaultAzureCredential. Connection strings are forbidden.

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.CosmosOptions.DatabaseName
member.summary: Database name. Defaults to acme-retail.

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.CosmosOptions.Containers
member.summary: Container names per .eas/project.md.

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.CosmosContainerNames
member.summary: Configured container names.

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.CosmosContainerNames.Products
member.summary: Products container name.

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.CosmosContainerNames.Categories
member.summary: Categories container name.

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.CosmosContainerNames.Carts
member.summary: Carts container name.

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.CosmosContainerNames.Orders
member.summary: Orders container name.

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.CosmosContainerNames.Customers
member.summary: Customers container name.

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.CosmosContainerNames.Audit
member.summary: Audit container name.

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.Repositories.CartRepository
member.summary: Cosmos-backed cart repository. Partition key: /customerId.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.Repositories.CartRepository.#ctor(Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.CosmosClient,Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.CosmosOptions})
member.summary: Creates a repository over the configured carts container.

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.Repositories.CustomerRepository
member.summary: Cosmos-backed customer repository. Partition key: /customerId.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.Repositories.CustomerRepository.#ctor(Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.CosmosClient,Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.CosmosOptions})
member.summary: Creates a repository over the configured customers container.

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.Repositories.CategoryRepository
member.summary: Cosmos-backed category repository. Partition key: /region.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.Repositories.CategoryRepository.#ctor(Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.CosmosClient,Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.CosmosOptions})
member.summary: Creates a repository over the configured categories container.

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.Repositories.AuditRepository
member.summary: Cosmos-backed audit repository. Partition key: /aggregateId; append-only.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.Repositories.AuditRepository.#ctor(Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.CosmosClient,Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.CosmosOptions})
member.summary: Creates a repository over the configured audit container.

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.Repositories.OrderRepository
member.summary: Cosmos-backed order repository. Partition key: /customerId; append-only.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.Repositories.OrderRepository.#ctor(Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.CosmosClient,Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.CosmosOptions})
member.summary: Creates a repository over the configured orders container.

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.Repositories.ProductRepository
member.summary: Cosmos-backed product repository. Partition key: /categoryId.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.Repositories.ProductRepository.#ctor(Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.CosmosClient,Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Cosmos.CosmosOptions})
member.summary: Creates a repository over the configured products container.

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Logging.SerilogConfig
member.summary: Serilog configuration helpers. The drops any log property whose name matches one of the PCI-forbidden tokens (pan/cardnumber/cvv/cvc/cardholder/track) before sinks ever see it.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Logging.SerilogConfig.WithForbiddenFieldRedaction(Serilog.Configuration.LoggerEnrichmentConfiguration)
member.summary: Adds the forbidden-field redaction enricher to a Serilog enricher configuration.

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Logging.ForbiddenFieldRedactionEnricher
member.summary: Drops any log property whose name matches a PCI-forbidden token.

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Payments.IPaymentProvider
member.summary: Payment provider abstraction. Implementations MUST tokenise — Acme NEVER receives PAN or CVV. Per ADR-0003 the production provider is selected by config; this sample defaults to a stub.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Payments.IPaymentProvider.CreateSessionAsync(System.Decimal,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Begins a payment session. The browser is redirected to where the provider hosts the PAN/CVV entry on its own (PCI-Level-1) page.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Payments.IPaymentProvider.CompleteAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Completes a session given the provider's session id. Returns the PCI-allowed token + last4 + bin + brand + expiry (null if the session does not exist or was not paid).

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Payments.RedirectResponse
member.summary: Response from .
member.param: URL the SPA must redirect the browser to.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Payments.RedirectResponse.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Response from .
member.param: URL the SPA must redirect the browser to.

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Payments.RedirectResponse.SessionId
member.summary: Opaque provider session id.

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Payments.RedirectResponse.RedirectUrl
member.summary: URL the SPA must redirect the browser to.

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Payments.PaymentToken
member.summary: Tokenised payment instrument data — the only payment fields Acme is permitted to store.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Payments.PaymentToken.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Tokenised payment instrument data — the only payment fields Acme is permitted to store.

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Payments.PaymentToken.Token
member.summary: Opaque provider token.

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Payments.PaymentToken.Last4
member.summary: Last 4 digits of the card.

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Payments.PaymentToken.Bin
member.summary: First 6 digits (BIN).

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Payments.PaymentToken.CardBrand
member.summary: Brand (visa/mc/amex).

member.name: P:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Payments.PaymentToken.ExpiryYearMonth
member.summary: Expiry as YYYY-MM.

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Payments.StubPaymentProvider
member.summary: Deterministic in-memory stub of . Used in Dev/Staging and tests. Per ADR-0003 the production provider is swapped via config — the contract above is identical to a real Stripe / Adyen / Braintree integration.
member.remarks: This stub never sees a PAN — by design. It returns a fake token derived from the session id. Default test card values (last4=4242, bin=424242, brand=visa) match common provider sandbox cards.

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Telemetry.SensitiveBodyTelemetryFilter
member.summary:
Application Insights telemetry processor that drops request and dependency *bodies* on routes covered by the PCI scope-reduction policy (.eas/policies/pci.md §2):
/payments
/checkout and any sub-route
/account/payment-methods
The metadata (URL path, status, duration) is preserved; only the *body* fields are scrubbed.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Telemetry.SensitiveBodyTelemetryFilter.#ctor(Microsoft.ApplicationInsights.Extensibility.ITelemetryProcessor)
member.summary: Creates the processor in the chain.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Infrastructure.Telemetry.SensitiveBodyTelemetryFilter.IsProtected(System.String)
member.summary: Public for unit-test access.
